title: limonium balearicum
intro: Limonium balearicum, also known as the Balearic Sea Lavender or Sea Lavender, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Plumbaginaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to its essential oil composition, particularly limonene and beta-pinene. The health benefits of Limonium balearicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a popular choice for treating wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Limonium balearicum can be found in the form of essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
